roa.docketEntryComment: NOTICE OF MOTION & MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE FILED

/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL APPEARED AND WAIVED DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE,  DEFENSE COUNSEL ADVISED THE COURT THAT DEFENDANT DOES NOT WISH TO RETURN TO COURT FORRESENTENCING AND HAS NO OBJECTION TO THE ISSUANCE OF AN AMENDED ORDER TO CDC TO REQUIRE THE AIDS TESTING PURSUANT TO PC 1202,1(A),  THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY ALSO HAD NO OBJECTION TO THE ISSUANCEOF THE AMENDED ORDER, /CTORD:IT ISHEREBY ORDERED THAT THE DEFENDANT BE TESTED FOR AIDS PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1202,1(A) BY CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS,  IT IS ALSO HEREBY ORDERED THAT CDC MEDICAL STAFF ADVISE THE COURT AND THE DEFENDANT OF THE RESULTS/

/AJW/CH1:SP  6 Y:M/2933,1(C)/X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED  655 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 98   SAGE FOR A TOTAL OF  753 DAYS,/X:DNA HAS BEENCOMPLIED/290/STATES/VF5:200/PAR/CDC/SECFEE/X:THIS IS A STRIKE OFFENSE,//TEXT/5A/5B/

/TWS/X:APD, THE OLD PRESENTENCE REPORT NEEDS TO BE REVIEWED AND REDONE,MAKE NO REFERENCE TO POLICE INCIDENT REPORT #021403544, AS THAT CHARGE WASDISMISSED,,  INSTEAD, REFER ONLY  TO POLICE INCIDENT REPORT #050975362 AS YOU ARE WRITING THE PRESENTENCE REPORT,  THE DRUG SUBSTANCE REPORT NEEDS TOBE REVIEWED AND REDONE TO INCLUDE COCAINE,/  /PRES:06-15-07/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENDANT AGREES TO BIFURCATION,/CONT//WIT SWORN:THASMI JONES/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 & 2 - PHOTOS/BAIL: 100,000//CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/
